## Summary
I've successfully renamed all occurrences of `PlanContext` to `PrContext` in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/test_shared.py`:
### Changes Applied:
1. **Import statement (line 7)**: - `from erk.core.plan_context_provider import PlanContext` → `from erk.core.plan_context_provider import PrContext`
2. **Function return type annotation (line 228)**: - `def _plan_context(...) -> PlanContext:` → `def _plan_context(...) -> PrContext:`
3. **Function docstring (line 229)**: - Updated to reference `PrContext` instead of `PlanContext`
4. **Constructor call (line 230)**: - `return PlanContext(` → `return PrContext(`
All other items were correctly preserved: - `PlanContextProvider` was not renamed (as instructed) - The module path `plan_context_provider` was not changed - Variable names like `plan_context` (lowercase) were not renamed - Test function names remain unchanged
